full_text:
Wang Xun (Liangfu)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Xun, styledLiangfu, was born in Tan county in Donghai. A virtuous scholar who set up a school. Clamped down on war avoidance from his soldiers. Wang Xun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Wang Xun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
